headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid MDLZ and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Mondelez trades at $61.49 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 8.1% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 9.9%.
